titlestmt.author: Compiled by J. Parker

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State Association of Family and Consumer Science Educators records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State Association of Family and Consumer Science Educators

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State Home Economics Teachers Association

did.physdesc: Reports, slides, texts, photographs, exams, newsletters, notebook.
did.abstract: Curriculum material, including annual reports of the Association, slides and photographs, texts, old Regents examinations, newsletters, a President's Notebook, meeting minutes.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Formerly known as the New York State Home Economics Teachers Association (HETA). This association was conceived in 1961, chartered in 1969, and changed its name in December 1999.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Curriculum material, including annual reports of the Association, slides and photographs, texts, old Regents examinations, newsletters, a President's Notebook, meeting minutes.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State Association of Family and Consumer Science Educators records, #4955. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Home economics -- Study and teaching -- New York (State).
